MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-06-2011 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON SEP-26-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. TERRY BREWER SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, JASON SHORT, AND LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY, MELVIN BELLI, PRESENT FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 9/22/11 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 AT THE REQUEST OF PARTIES. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND A REPRESENTATIVE FROM U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION WITH FULL SETTLEMENT AUTHORITY BE PRESENT AT THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND AT TRIAL. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: SRavinantapricha; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, U.S. National Bank is present. Represented by Jeffrey Pergin
Attorney, Terri L. Brewer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ramon Aguas, is present.
Attorney, Melvin Caesar Belli, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Teri Jackson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 01, 2011:
Terri L. Brewer, Esq. (925.945.1481) for plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association, as Trustee for RFMSI 2006SA3
Melvin C. Belli, limited scope attorney appearing for and with defendants Ramon Aguas and Eulalia Aguas

Settlement conference is held; case is not settled. The September 6, 2011 trial date remains.

Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (514)
